summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ABS CLOISON website - premium removable partition company showcase. All core functionality working excellently with 100% backend API success and strong frontend performance.

backend_issues.notes: All backend APIs functioning perfectly with proper error handling and data validation

minor_issues.issue: Click interference from platform badge overlay on mobile
minor_issues.note: Platform-specific issue, not app functionality problem

passed_tests: Home page hero slider loads and auto-rotates (5s interval)
Navigation between all 5 pages (Accueil, Nos Systèmes, Expertise, Portfolio, Contact)
Navbar glass effect transitions on scroll
GET /api/portfolio returns 6 portfolio items as expected
Sticky callback button opens modal and submits via POST /api/rappel
Portfolio filter buttons work (tous, bureaux, showrooms, industrie)
Real photos and videos load correctly
Contact info displays correctly (address: 642 Route de Lyon Anse, phone: 07 53 80 12 60, email: abscloison@gmail.com)
Backend API error handling with proper 422 status codes

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all core features working, 1 minor platform issue)
